questions.question: What did Trump say was "highly unlikely" as the Iran conflict continued?
options: Keeping the Strait of Hormuz open
questions.explanation: Trump said he was "highly unlikely" to extend the Iran ceasefire and warned that if it expired, "then lots of bombs start going off."

questions.question: Who resigned minutes before the House Ethics Committee was set to vote on whether to recommend expulsion?
questions.explanation: Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick resigned just before the committee vote, ending the panel's jurisdiction over her case and avoiding a House vote on expulsion.

questions.question: How much did the Trump administration agree to pay Carter Page to settle his claims over FBI surveillance during the Russia investigation?
questions.explanation: The administration agreed to pay Carter Page $1.25 million to settle his lawsuit over surveillance applications that an inspector general later found contained major errors and omissions.

questions.question: What reason did a Virginia judge give for blocking state officials from certifying the new congressional map?
options: The map failed to meet federal Voting Rights Act standards
The referendum violated the state constitution and the ballot question was misleading
The legislature had not funded implementation of the new districts
The state Supreme Court had already issued a stay
questions.explanation: Judge Jack Hurley said the referendum violated the state constitution and called the ballot question "flagrantly misleading," so he blocked certification of the new map.

questions.question: Which official fired Navy Secretary John Phelan?
questions.explanation: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth fired Navy Secretary John Phelan, and Navy Undersecretary Hung Cao was named acting secretary.

questions.question: What did Senate Republicans vote 50-48 to advance?
options: A budget plan with about $70 billion for ICE and Border Patrol
A military aid package for Pakistan
A law permanently changing Virginia's redistricting system
questions.explanation: Senate Republicans advanced a budget plan providing about $70 billion in ICE and Border Patrol funding for the rest of Trump's term through reconciliation.

questions.question: Which quote was Trump's response to companies that choose not to seek refunds for tariffs the Supreme Court ruled illegal?
options: "It has to be clean because it has to be quick"
"It's brilliant if they don't do that"
questions.explanation: Trump said, "It's brilliant if they don't do that," and added that he would "remember" the companies that declined to seek tariff refunds.

questions.question: What did House Judiciary Democrats demand that FBI Director Kash Patel complete?
options: A World Health Organization alcohol-use screening test
A polygraph about leaked tax records
questions.explanation: House Judiciary Democrats demanded that Patel complete a World Health Organization alcohol-use screening test after reports of excessive drinking and unexplained absences.
